title: Fix intermittent 'failed to show menu' error for food menu and payment options

requirements.text: Fix the intermittent failure in the food menu display on MenuDisplay.tsx: add robust error handling and retry logic so that when the menu items query fails or returns empty, a user-friendly error state with a retry button is shown instead of a blank screen or cryptic error message.

quotes: payment options and food menu is missing some times showing error message

acceptanceCriteria: Menu items load successfully on repeated page visits without intermittent blank states
When loading fails, a clear error message with a 'Try Again' retry button is shown
The React Query hook for menu items uses retry logic (at least 3 retries with backoff) to handle transient backend failures
Loading skeleton is shown while data is being fetched or retried

requirements.text: Fix the intermittent failure in the payment options display on PaymentPage.tsx: ensure the payment QR code and payment options load reliably by adding error boundaries, retry logic on the usePaymentQRCode query, and a fallback UI when the QR code cannot be loaded.

quotes: payment options and food menu is missing some times showing error message

acceptanceCriteria: Payment QR code and payment options render consistently without intermittent blank or error states
When the QR code query fails, a user-friendly error message with a retry button is displayed instead of a blank payment page
The React Query hook for the payment QR code uses retry logic (at least 3 retries with backoff)
The PaymentQRCodeModal also handles loading and error states gracefully

requirements.text: Add a global error boundary component to catch and display unhandled React rendering errors across all pages, showing a friendly error screen with a reload option rather than a white blank screen.
acceptanceCriteria: A React error boundary wraps the main route content in App.tsx
When any page crashes, the error boundary shows a branded error screen with a 'Reload' button
Error boundary does not interfere with normal application flow

requirements.text: Audit the backend Motoko actor's getMenuItems and getPaymentQRCode query functions to ensure they always return a valid, non-error response even under concurrent load or empty state conditions — returning empty arrays or null values rather than trapping.

quotes: payment options and food menu is missing some times showing error message

acceptanceCriteria: getMenuItems always returns an array (empty or populated) and never traps
getPaymentQRCode returns a proper optional value and never traps
Backend functions handle edge cases such as uninitialized state or empty storage gracefully

constraints: Do not change the existing route structure in App.tsx
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Preserve all existing QR code payment flow logic in PaymentPage.tsx
nonGoals: Adding new menu categories or items
Changing the visual design or color theme
Modifying authentication or admin access control logic
Real-time updates or WebSocket-based menu refresh
